message:
Fix lint ignore pattern for generated sidebar file

Update ignore patterns from sidebar-changelog.ts to
sidebar-changelog.generated.ts to match the actual filename.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ dist/
 
 # Auto-generated changelog
 src/content/docs/changelog/
-src/sidebar-changelog.ts
+src/sidebar-changelog.generated.ts
 
 # Auto-updated reference docs
 src/content/docs/reference/functions/
